current_extraction.notes: Structured US NSM-AI Framework into <dirname>-sections.{csv,json}. 14 headings captured; 4 with Pillar identifiers (I-IV). The sub-section headings beneath each Pillar are present as rows with empty section_id (no numerical anchor in the source). Columns: depth, section_id, section_name, id_kind, parent_id, body. Reusable parser at tools-resources/utils/parse_regulatory_sections.py.
